final:
module left_shifter(
    input               clk         ,
    input               rst_n       ,
    input       [7:0]   data_in     ,
    input       [2:0]   shift_amount,

    output  reg [7:0]   data_out
);

    // Shift operation
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    begin end  // redundant
        if (!rst_n) begin
            data_out <= 0;
        end else begin
            data_out <= data_in << shift_amount;
        end
    end

endmodule
